params.SpellDescription: If any source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player this turn, it deals double that damage to that permanent or player instead.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: If any source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player this turn, it deals double that damage to that permanent or player instead.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever a source you control deals damage to an opponent, you may put a quest counter on CARDNAME.
